title: cyperus parishii
intro: Cyperus parishii, also known as the Parish's sedge or the dwarf papyrus, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial aquatic plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Cyperus parishii include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving congestion and coughs, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Cyperus parishii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
